title: Anemonidium flaccidum
taxonomy: Anemonidium flaccidum is classified in the family Asparagaceae. More specifically, it is placed within the subfamily Nolinoideae. This subfamily is a part of the order Asparagales, which contains various flowering plants. The classification of Anemonidium flaccidum reflects its evolutionary relationships with other plants in the Asparagaceae family. Further research into its classification may provide additional details on its taxonomic position.
